allow: PowerShell($gh = "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; "--- cert/pages state ---"; & $gh api repos/VasilyPorsev/finance-card/pages --jq '{cert: .https_certificate.state, https_enforced, status}' 2>&1; "--- https reachability ---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://vasiliy-ai.ru/" -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; "https OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "https not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
